## LinkedIn (Long-form)

### Announcement Post

**AI-powered real estate intelligence for informed decisions**

I'm excited to share Access To Housing — a free, open-source AI tool for real estate professionals, investors, and housing counselors.

Here's the problem: PropTech intelligence, market analysis, Fair Housing compliance. But navigating this space is complex, and most people don't have a specialist by their side.

Access To Housing changes that. It's a Claude Skill — upload one file to Claude, and it becomes your housing expert. No code, no cost.

What you can do:
1. Run a comparative market analysis with climate risk scoring
2. Check Fair Housing compliance before listing a property
3. Generate an investment feasibility report for multifamily housing

It's part of the Access To ecosystem — 6 pillars, 7 projects, all open source.

Try it: github.com/dougdevitre/access-to-housing
Learn more: https://dougdevitre.org

#AccessTo #CivicTech #AI #OpenSource #Housing
